purpose: Verdex mainnet governance and genesis-vault Safe ownership proposal
deploymentPrerequisites: Each owner confirms that its key was created from a new, unshared hardware-wallet backup.
A Verdex EVM staging/mainnet chain is live and independently reachable.
A Safe-compatible singleton and proxy factory have been deployed and verified on that chain.
Each owner verifies the Safe setup transaction on its own hardware-wallet screen before signing.
prohibited: Do not use any address whose private key, seed phrase, or wallet backup was shared in chat or stored online.
Do not fund or use this proposed Safe until the deployment prerequisites are satisfied.
